text.title: Business Storytelling (Pyramid / SCQA / Pixar) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: select-framework
step.action: Decision → Pyramid; tension → SCQA; outcome story → Pixar.

step.name: write-central-claim
step.action: Compose 1-sentence claim ≤200 chars that stands alone.

step.name: fill-framework-body
step.action: Pyramid → 3 MECE supports + so_what. SCQA → S-C-Q-A. Pixar → 6-block causal arc.

step.name: so-what-pass
step.decision-gate: If any fact lacks implication, return to step 3.
